name: .38 Rounds
description: Small-caliber pistol ammunition designed for double-action revolvers before the Great War. Abundant enough that it is the ammunition of choice for most makeshift firearms.

name: 10mm Rounds
description: One of the most common types of pistol round found in the wastelands, manufactured in vast quantities before the Great War for 10mm pistols.

name: .308 Rounds
description: A high-powered rifle round normally used in hunting rifles and some bolt-action pipe rifles.

name: Flare
description: A small tube like a shotgun cartridge, containing a chemical which burns brightly when ignited. Fired from a flare gun.

name: Shotgun Shell
description: The standard shotgun shell found in the wastelands is a 12 gauge 2 3/4" cartridge filled with #0 buckshot.

name: .45 Rounds
description: A decent round which combines reasonable stopping power with manageable recoil.

name: Flamer Fuel
description: Fuel for flamers and other fire-based weapons.

name: Fusion Cell
description: A small, self-contained power source used by many energy weapons. When found, it is in the form of a small battery-like device.

name: Gamma Round
description: Specialized ammunition for the gamma gun, inflicting radiation damage.

name: Railway Spikes
description: A standard railway spike, used as ammunition for the railway rifle.

name: Syringe
description: Syringer ammunition comes in various forms, often hand-crafted by wasteland chemists. None of the Effects rolled on the damage roll inflict any additional effects.

name: .44 Rounds
description: The powerful .44 Magnum round was originally developed for revolvers. Its excellent stopping power makes it a favorite among wastelanders.

name: .50 Rounds
description: A high-powered rifle round used by specialized weapons.

name: 5.56mm Rounds
description: The standard U.S. Army rifle round before the Great War. Common enough to sustain regular use.

name: 5mm Rounds
description: Small-caliber ammunition used by miniguns and other Gatling weapons. Consumed at ten times the normal rate.

name: Fusion Core
description: A large, powerful energy source used by Power Armor and some heavy energy weapons.

name: Missile
description: A self-propelled explosive projectile used by missile launchers and similar heavy weapons.

name: Plasma Cartridge
description: A specialized energy cartridge used by plasma weapons.

name: 2mm EC
description: Electromagnetic cartridge used by the gauss rifle. Rare and expensive.

name: Mini-Nuke
description: A miniature nuclear warhead used by the Fat Man launcher. Extremely rare and devastating.
